description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and deploy, and a global before_script that runs `make clean` then `make check` before every job. Add a test_job in the test stage that runs the shell command `script/ci/test` and is tagged with `slashdeploy`. Add a deploy_job in the deploy stage that runs the shell command `script/ci/deploy`, is tagged with `slashdeploy`, runs only on the master branch, and deploys to the production environment. No Docker image, services, caches, or artifacts are defined.
